title: Geepas Electric Hair Clipper – AC Mains Clipper/Trimmer with High Precision Ceramic Blades – Ergonomic Design – 4 Combs, Brush & Oil Included – Creates Fine Lines Contours & Details - 2 Year Warranty
features: ✅ POWERFUL TRIMMING - Detailer features a quiet, professional rotary motor providing a powerful trimming action with low vibration. Lightweight and stylish design provides you with balance and control when outlining.

✅ HIGH PRECISION CERAMIC BLADE – Blades are designed with high precision ground for superior performance. The finer the teeth, the finer the quality. It ensures maximum durability and ensure the best cutting performance.

✅ CORDED FOR CONTINUOUS POWER - Particularly useful if you need to use it for an extended period of time. The blades adjust to zero-overlap for super close trimming, outlines and accurate detail work.

✅ TRIM, MORE STYLING OPTIONS – Includes 4 haircut limit combs to give you more styling options than ever. Now you can try out the latest styles in the same professional way. Creates fine lines, contours and details, great hair trimmer for men.

✅ ACCESSORIES INCLUDED, 2 YEARS MANUFACTURER WARRANTY - This device comes with a few accessories including a power adapter, 4 Haircut limit comb cleaning brush and oil. It is compact, very easy and lightweight. It gives segmented cut and greatly enhances sharpness.
description: Product Description Hey, i can make you look Smart! Geepas Men's AC Mains Electric Hair Clipper provides you with a simple and effortless solution to your daily trimming needs. It is specifically designed to catch every hair and give excellent trimming results. It is made of sturdy and durable material and is suited for long-term usage. Mains operated clipper for continuous high power and performance This Clipper is mains operated to ensure continuous high power and performance. High grade, ceramic blades provide optimum sharpness and precision and an all over even cut. POWERFUL TRIMMING Detailer features a quiet, professional rotary motor providing a powerful trimming action with low vibration. Lightweight and stylish design provides you with balance and control when outlining. HIGH PRECISION CERAMIC BLADE Blades are designed with high precision ground for superior performance. The finer the teeth, the finer the quality. It ensures maximum durability and ensure the best cutting performance. ERGONOMIC DESIGN, SAFE USE The blade is even and smooth. It reduces the risk of any injury to the face. The tip of the trimmer is rounded to ensure smooth skin contact. Powerful, quiet operation with comfort grip for easy handling THE KIT HAS EVERYTHING YOU NEED This kit has everything you need to achieve a fresh cut with every use. Ensure you maintain the blades with the oil and cleaning brush to keep the blades sharp and free of hair so you achieve a close cut every time.
